overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2032 Term Muni Bond ETF (IBMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks the investment results of an investment-grade U.S. municipal bonds index expected to mature or be redeemed before December 2032 IBMU was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P AMT-Free Municipal Series Callable-Adjusted 2032 Index
